panels.title: Backend Server Up (Traefik LB)
panels.description: 1 = Traefik load-balancer server reachable. Only hocuspocus@docker has a Traefik service today; rest-api appears here automatically once it receives traffic.

panels.title: Backend Error % (5xx + no-response)
panels.description: Share of backend requests returning 5xx or code=0 (no upstream response).

panels.title: Backend Error Rate by Service (5xx + code=0)
Backend p95 Latency by Service
panels.description: Edge latency from Traefik service histogram. This is per-service, not per-route (no app /metrics endpoint exists).

panels.title: Backend Container Memory % of Spec Limit
panels.description: working_set / spec_memory_limit. Meaningless where no limit is set (limit reports machine total).

panels.title: Backend Container Network I/O (Rx up / Tx down)
Frontend + Admin Network I/O (Rx up / Tx down)
Service Bottleneck Summary (p95 · p99 · req/s · error %)
panels.description: Per-service edge metrics from Traefik. Sort by p95 or Error % to find the problem service.

panels.title: REST API p95 Latency by Route
panels.description: In-app http_request_duration_seconds histogram, per route. Finer-grained than the Traefik edge view above.

panels.title: REST API Error Rate by Route (5xx)
Worker Job Duration p95 by Queue
Worker Queue Depth by State
panels.description: queue_jobs gauge: pending/active/delayed/failed counts per BullMQ queue.

panels.title: Node Heap Used / Total by Job
GC Rate by Job
panels.description: rate of nodejs_gc_duration_seconds events from prom-client default metrics.

panels.title: Active Documents (in memory)
panels.description: ws_active_documents gauge: documents currently loaded in hocuspocus-server memory.

panels.title: Document Load p95
panels.description: histogram_quantile over document_load_duration_seconds_bucket: fetch + decode time.

panels.title: Document Persist p95 (store-hook overhead)
panels.description: histogram_quantile over document_persist_duration_seconds_bucket: enqueue overhead, not the async DB write.

panels.title: Awareness Update Rate
panels.description: rate of ws_awareness_updates_total: presence/cursor churn across all documents.

panels.title: Y.Doc Update Size p50 / p95
panels.description: histogram_quantile over ydoc_update_bytes_bucket: per-update edit volume.

panels.title: WS Messages by Type
panels.description: sum by (type) rate of ws_messages_total: sync vs awareness vs stateless traffic.
